languages.text: {n}Не впервой Человечеству подтверждать свое право на владение Галактикой силой оружия. Меровский полк жаждал отмщения за павших — и получил его. Глаза и души их пылали — и в этом пламени сгорело немало ксеносов, прежде чем они оказались отброшены к руинам или истреблены.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Не впервой Человечеству подтверждать свое право на владение Галактикой силой оружия. Меровский полк жаждал отмщения за павших — и получил его. Глаза и души их пылали — и в этом пламени сгорело немало ксеносов, прежде чем они оказались отброшены к руинам или истреблены.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Not for the first time, Humanity asserted its right to rule the galaxy by force of arms. The Merov Regiment thirsted for vengeance for the fallen — and took it. Their eyes and souls were ablaze, and in those flames many xenos burned before they were driven back to the ruins or exterminated.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Не впервой Человечеству подтверждать свое право на владение Галактикой силой оружия. Меровский полк жаждал отмщения за павших — и получил его. Глаза и души их пылали — и в этом пламени сгорело немало ксеносов, прежде чем они оказались отброшены к руинам или истреблены.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Not for the first time, Humanity asserted its right to rule the Galaxy by force of arms. The Merov Regiment thirsted for vengeance for the fallen — and got it. Their eyes and souls were ablaze — and in those flames many xenos burned before they were driven back to the ruins or exterminated.{/n}

{n}Not for the first time, Humanity asserted its right to rule the Galaxy by force of arms. The Merov Regiment thirsted for vengeance for the fallen — and took it. Their eyes and souls were ablaze, and in those flames many xenos burned before they were driven back to the ruins or exterminated.{/n}

{n}Not for the first time, Humanity asserted its right to rule the Galaxy by force of arms. After the brutal assault on Tsar-Cage, the Merov Regiment thirsted for vengeance for the fallen — and got it. Their eyes and souls were ablaze — and in those flames many xenos burned before they were driven back to the ruins or exterminated.{/n}

{n}Not for the first time, Humanity asserted its right to rule the Galaxy by force of arms. After the brutal assault on the Cage, the Merov Regiment thirsted for vengeance for the fallen — and got it. Their eyes and souls were ablaze — and in those flames many xenos burned before they were driven back to the ruins or exterminated.{/n}

{n}Not for the first time, Humanity asserted its right to rule the Galaxy by force of arms. The Merov Regiment thirsted for vengeance for the fallen — and got it. Their eyes and souls were ablaze — and in those flames many xenos burned before they were driven back to the ruins or exterminated.{/n}

{n}Not for the first time, Humanity asserted its right to rule the Galaxy by force of arms. The Merov Regiment thirsted for vengeance for the fallen — and took it. Their eyes and souls were ablaze, and in those flames many xenos burned before they were driven back to the ruins or exterminated.{/n}

languages.text: {n}人類は銀河を支配する権利を、再び武力で主張した。ツァー・ケージの惨殺後、メローヴ連隊は倒れた仲間の復讐を渇望し、その望みを叶えた。彼らの目は魂は燃え上がり、その炎の中で多くの異種族が焼き尽くされ、廃墟に追い詰められたり、全滅させられたりした。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Not for the first time, Humanity asserted its right to rule the Galaxy by force of arms. After the brutal assault on Tsar-Cage, the Merov Regiment thirsted for vengeance for the fallen — and got it. Their eyes and souls were ablaze — and in those flames many xenos burned before they were driven back to the ruins or exterminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 人類は銀河を支配する権利を、再び武力で主張した。ツァー・ケージの惨殺後、メローヴ連隊は倒れた仲間の復讐を渇望し、その望みを叶えた。彼らの目は魂は燃え上がり、その炎の中で多くの異種族が焼き尽くされ、廃墟に追い詰められたり、全滅させられたりした。

languages.text: {n}Por enésima vez, la Humanidad demostró su derecho a gobernar la galaxia mediante las armas. El regimiento de Merov ansiaba venganza por sus caídos... y se la cobró. Sus ojos y almas ardían con un fuego que consumió a numerosos xenos, que se vieron obligado a retirarse a las ruinas o ser exterminados.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Not for the first time, Humanity asserted its right to rule the galaxy by force of arms. The Merov Regiment thirsted for vengeance for the fallen — and took it. Their eyes and souls were ablaze, and in those flames many xenos burned before they were driven back to the ruins or exterminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Por enésima vez, la Humanidad demostró su derecho a gobernar la galaxia mediante las armas. El regimiento de Merov ansiaba venganza por sus caídos... y se la cobró. Sus ojos y almas ardían con un fuego que consumió a numerosos xenos, que se vieron obligado a retirarse a las ruinas o ser exterminados.{/n}

languages.text: {n}人类再一次以武力宣示了对银河的主权。梅罗夫军团上下无不渴望为死者复仇——而今，他们得偿所愿。战士们的双眼与灵魂深处燃烧着复仇的熊熊烈焰，在这烈焰烧灼之下，无数异形被烧成灰烬，或被赶回遗迹。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Not for the first time, Humanity asserted its right to rule the galaxy by force of arms. The Merov Regiment thirsted for vengeance for the fallen — and took it. Their eyes and souls were ablaze, and in those flames many xenos burned before they were driven back to the ruins or exterminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}人类再一次以武力宣示了对银河的主权。梅罗夫军团上下无不渴望为死者复仇——而今，他们得偿所愿。战士们的双眼与灵魂深处燃烧着复仇的熊熊烈焰，在这烈焰烧灼之下，无数异形被烧成灰烬，或被赶回遗迹。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nicht zum ersten Mal hatte die Menschheit ihren Herrschaftsanspruch über die Galaxis mit Waffengewalt untermauert. Das Merov-Regiment dürstete nach Rache für die Gefallenen ... und bekam sie. Ihre Augen und Seelen brannten und in diesen Flammen fanden viele Xenos den Tod, ehe sie zu den Ruinen zurückgedrängt oder vernichtet wurden.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Not for the first time, Humanity asserted its right to rule the galaxy by force of arms. The Merov Regiment thirsted for vengeance for the fallen — and took it. Their eyes and souls were ablaze, and in those flames many xenos burned before they were driven back to the ruins or exterminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nicht zum ersten Mal hatte die Menschheit ihren Herrschaftsanspruch über die Galaxis mit Waffengewalt untermauert. Das Merov-Regiment dürstete nach Rache für die Gefallenen ... und bekam sie. Ihre Augen und Seelen brannten und in diesen Flammen fanden viele Xenos den Tod, ehe sie zu den Ruinen zurückgedrängt oder vernichtet wurden.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İnsanlık, galaksiyi yönetme hakkını silah zoruyla ilk kez ortaya koymuyor. Merov Alayı, yitenlerin intikamını almak istiyordu. Gözleri ve ruhları alev alevdi. Bu alevlerde pek çok zeno, harabelere geri sürülmeden veya yok edilmeden evvel yandı.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Not for the first time, Humanity asserted its right to rule the galaxy by force of arms. The Merov Regiment thirsted for vengeance for the fallen — and took it. Their eyes and souls were ablaze, and in those flames many xenos burned before they were driven back to the ruins or exterminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İnsanlık, galaksiyi yönetme hakkını silah zoruyla ilk kez ortaya koymuyor. Merov Alayı, yitenlerin intikamını almak istiyordu. Gözleri ve ruhları alev alevdi. Bu alevlerde pek çok zeno, harabelere geri sürülmeden veya yok edilmeden evvel yandı.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Une fois de plus, l'humanité affirma par la force des armes son droit à régner sur la galaxie. Le régiment de Merov criait vengeance pour ses morts – et l'obtint. Les yeux comme les âmes des soldats étaient incandescents, et de nombreux xénos s'y brûlèrent avant d'être repoussés dans les ruines ou exterminés.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Not for the first time, Humanity asserted its right to rule the galaxy by force of arms. The Merov Regiment thirsted for vengeance for the fallen — and took it. Their eyes and souls were ablaze, and in those flames many xenos burned before they were driven back to the ruins or exterminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Une fois de plus, l'humanité affirma par la force des armes son droit à régner sur la galaxie. Le régiment de Merov criait vengeance pour ses morts – et l'obtint. Les yeux comme les âmes des soldats étaient incandescents, et de nombreux xénos s'y brûlèrent avant d'être repoussés dans les ruines ou exterminés.{/n}
